prompt:
Generate an image in the style of Japanese ukiyo-e woodblock print (Edo period).

A lone traveler walking down a winding mountain path toward a valley, representing gradual descent.

The path curves smoothly downward with multiple subtle trails showing iterative movement.

Use flat areas of color, bold outlines, minimal shading, traditional indigo and muted earth tones, strong composition inspired by Hokusai.

Paper texture, woodblock print style, no modern elements, no text.
tradition_approach: Flat colors, bold outlines, flowing composition, indigo palette, minimal shading, woodblock texture inspired by Hokusai to reflect smooth iterative descent
